meaning: [军] Memorandum of Understanding,谅解备忘录
examples: The MoU covers cooperation in designing, manufacturing and testing of a relay station.
The partnership was recently made official through a memorandum of understanding (MOU).
By signing the MOU, UPS intended to make its uniformed drivers and brown trucks a common site on the streets of major business centers in China.
Since the MOU was signed, approximately 3, 100 detainees have been transferred to Afghan control.
After a two-year suspension, Indonesia has just signed an MOU with Malaysia and resumed sending workers there.
